title: Global Climate & Sustainability B2B Lead Finder

seeds.title: Seed sources
seeds.description: Company homepages, search result pages, or directory/listing URLs to start crawling from.

maxDepth.title: Max crawl depth
maxDepth.description: Maximum crawl depth from each seed domain.

maxCompanies.title: Max companies
maxCompanies.description: Hard limit on number of company records to output.

includeJobPages.title: Include job pages
includeJobPages.description: Whether to search for ESG‑related jobs on company career pages.

includeReports.title: Include reports
includeReports.description: Whether to look for ESG/sustainability report PDFs.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Select proxies to be used by your crawler.

languages.title: Languages
languages.description: Preferred languages (e.g., ['en', 'de', 'fr']) to prioritize when scanning text.

minScore.title: Minimum intent score
minScore.description: Minimum 'sustainability intent score' to include a company in output (0–100).
